user.title: Denkirs
user.description: How would you like to add your Denkirs fixtures?

cloud.title: Tuya cloud discovery
cloud.description: Enter the credentials of your Tuya IoT project. They are used once to discover the gateway and every fixture behind it; control stays local afterwards.

gateway_select.title: Select the gateway
gateway_select.description: More than one gateway was found. Choose the one to configure.

fixtures.title: Select fixtures
fixtures.description: Choose the fixtures to add. Everything except battery wall switches is selected by default.

gateway_ip.title: Gateway address
gateway_ip.description: The gateway could not be found automatically. Enter its IP address on your network.

manual.title: Denkirs gateway
manual.description: Enter the connection details of the Denkirs Wi-Fi gateway.

lamp.title: Add a fixture
lamp.description: Add a track fixture that lives behind the gateway.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the gateway. Check the host and local key.
error.cloud_auth: Tuya rejected these credentials. Check the region, Client ID and Client Secret.
error.no_gateways: No gateway with fixtures was found in this account.

abort.reconfigure_successful: The fixture list was refreshed from the cloud.
abort.no_cloud_credentials: This entry was set up manually, so there are no cloud credentials to re-sync with.
abort.no_gateways: The gateway was not found in the account.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tuya cloud.
